pages.text: Zindzi and Tim Tam were best friends. They did everything together.

blocks.text: Zindzi and Tim Tam were best friends. They did everything together.

pages.text: ‘Do you want to play dress-up?’ asked Oswin. ‘No thank you,’ said Zindzi. ‘I’ll play dress-up with Tim Tam.’

blocks.text: ‘Do you want to play dress-up?’ asked Oswin.
‘No thank you,’ said Zindzi. ‘I’ll play dress-up with Tim Tam.’

pages.text: ‘Do you want to do a puzzle with me?’ asked Kaya. ‘No thank you,’ said Zindzi. ‘I like doing puzzles with Tim Tam.’

blocks.text: ‘Do you want to do a puzzle with me?’ asked Kaya.
‘No thank you,’ said Zindzi. ‘I like doing puzzles with Tim Tam.’

pages.text: ‘Do you want to join our scooter race?’ asked The Twins. ‘No thank you,’ said Zindzi. ‘I’ll race with Tim Tam.’

blocks.text: ‘Do you want to join our scooter race?’ asked The Twins.
‘No thank you,’ said Zindzi. ‘I’ll race with Tim Tam.’

pages.text: One day, Tim Tam didn’t come to school. ‘Tim Tam is sick,’ said Teacher. ‘Why don’t you play with your other friends, Zindzi?’

blocks.text: One day, Tim Tam didn’t come to school.
‘Tim Tam is sick,’ said Teacher. ‘Why don’t you play with your other friends, Zindzi?’

pages.text: Oswin was making a Get Well Soon card for Tim Tam. ‘But… Tim Tam is my best friend,’ said Zindzi.

blocks.text: Oswin was making a Get Well Soon card for Tim Tam.
‘But… Tim Tam is my best friend,’ said Zindzi.

pages.text: ‘You can help me,’ said Oswin. ‘Dip dip, dab dab.’ ‘Dip dip, dab dab,’ said Zindzi.

blocks.text: ‘You can help me,’ said Oswin. ‘Dip dip, dab dab.’ ‘Dip dip, dab dab,’ said Zindzi.

pages.text: When the card was done, Oswin and Zindzi played dress-up. The next day, they played hopscotch with Kaya. The day after that, the three of them rode scooters with The Twins.

blocks.text: When the card was done, Oswin and Zindzi played dress-up.
The next day, they played hopscotch with Kaya.
The day after that, the three of them rode scooters with The Twins.

pages.text: On Monday, Tim Tam came back to school. ‘Let’s go read a book with Oswin!’ said Zindzi.

blocks.text: On Monday, Tim Tam came back to school.
‘Let’s go read a book with Oswin!’ said Zindzi.

pages.text: ‘Is Oswin your best friend now?’ asked Tim Tam. ‘He’s my new friend,’ said Zindzi. ‘He’s your friend too! Look, we made you a card.’

blocks.text: ‘Is Oswin your best friend now?’ asked Tim Tam.
‘He’s my new friend,’ said Zindzi. ‘He’s your friend too! Look, we made you a card.’
‘Should we all play together?’

pages.text: ‘Okay,’ said Tim Tam. ‘Let’s all be best friends!’
